---
title: "Canon Audit"
---

# Canon Audit

The canon audit page is intentionally strict. AI-assisted pre-audit can prepare evidence, but the project cannot claim human canonical signoff until a named human maintainer records it.

## Status

- Current status: `pending-human-maintainer-signoff`
- Policy: Codex can prepare audit records and preflight evidence, but canonical human review requires a named human maintainer decision.

## Required Human Fields

- `reviewer`
- `review_date`
- `decision`
- `scope`
- `notes`

## Queue

| Audit                                   | Scope                                      | Prepared Evidence                                                       | Status  | Blocker                                                                                       |
| --------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------ | ----------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| canon.major-50.shadow-review            | 50 major canon entries                     | data/canon_quality.json shows 50/50 reviewed major-canon shadows.       | pending | A named human maintainer must decide whether these reviewed shadows are canonically accepted. |
| canon.pocket-300.prompt-use-review      | 300 pocket canon entries                   | Every reviewed entry has prompt uses and examples.                      | pending | Usage-earned promotion needs maintainer acceptance and issue-driven correction path.          |
| canon.first-two-houses.reviewed-tranche | Architecture and language/semantics houses | data/semantic_promotion.json marks the first two houses fully reviewed. | pending | Canonical status remains blocked on human review notes.                                       |

## Decision Intake

Use the pending decision template and validator when a named maintainer is ready
to record a real audit decision:

```bash
python3 scripts/check_canon_audit_decision.py validate examples/canon/canon-audit-decision-template.json
```

The pending template validates structure only. It must not be counted as human
signoff until the record is replaced with a `human-signed` decision that names
the reviewer, date, decision, evidence checked, correction outcome, and signoff
notes.

Raw data: [canon_audit.json](../data/canon_audit.json)

Pending decision template: [canon-audit-decision-template.json](../examples/canon/canon-audit-decision-template.json)
